data.cheatsheetContent:
Decide if A=({{ equation1 }}) implies B=({{ equation2 }}) over magmas. No axioms. Follow exactly. Stop on first match. No rule→FALSE. Run full process twice; use first result if consistent, else majority of three runs.

STEP 0: COLLAPSE
A bare: single var vs product. Normalize: LHS=single var→x; rename others y,z,w by 1st appearance; keep brackets.
Match canonical:
- x=x*(y*(z*(x*y))) → LEFT PROJ: p*q→p
- x=x*((y*z)*(z*z)) → LEFT PROJ
- x=(((y*z)*x)*z)*x → RIGHT PROJ: p*q→q
If match: eval B under proj; collapse sides to leftmost/rightmost var; TRUE if same var else FALSE.

Non‑bare constant‑product: normalize rename. If LHS=x*y and RHS=U*V with all x in V, none in U:
- collapse non‑var product→c; vars stay.
- B sides collapse to same symbol? TRUE else FALSE.

STEP 0B: CONTRADICTION MOTIFS (A bare, STEP0 no fire)
Product side only; swap so single var LHS. Compute:
R=#distinct vars prod side
T=sorted counts no sep (122,113,1112)
Lx=leftmost is x? Rx=rightmost is x?
xTop=left/right/both if x only in U/only in V/both at top split U*V
sq=contains u*u?
ts=v‑m(var*prod), m‑v(prod*var), m‑m(both prod)

C1: R=4 & !Lx & !Rx → TRUE
C2: R=3, T=113, !Lx, !Rx → TRUE
C3: !Lx & xTop=left & sq & ts=m‑v → TRUE
C4: R=3, T=112, !Lx, !Rx, xTop=right, ts=v‑m → TRUE
C5: R=4, T=1112, !Lx, !Rx, xTop=right, ts=v‑m → TRUE
C6: R=3, xTop=right, ts=v‑m, x occurs 2× → TRUE
C7: R=3, !Lx, !Rx, xTop=left, ts=m‑v, x occurs 2× → TRUE
C8: R=3, Lx, xTop=left, ts=m‑v → TRUE
C9: R=3, T=122, Lx, !Rx, xTop=both, ts=v‑m → TRUE
C10: R=3, T=122, !Lx, Rx, x occurs 2× → TRUE
C11: R=3, T=113, !Lx, !Rx, xTop=right, ts=v‑m → TRUE
C12: R=3, T=113, !Lx, !Rx, xTop=left, ts=m‑v → TRUE
C13: R=4, T=1112, !Lx, Rx → TRUE
C14: B bare, R=3, T=113, Rx, !sq → TRUE

STEP 1: FEATURES
For eq E(L=R):
size=total var occ
vars=#distinct letters
imb=sum|Lcount‑Rcount|
bare=one side single var
LP=leftmost equal
RP=rightmost equal
SET=same var set
XOR=each var parity equal
AB=exact counts equal
Compute for A and B.

STEP 2: SEPARATORS → FALSE if:
LP(A)&!LP(B) | RP(A)&!RP(B) | SET(A)&!SET(B) | XOR(A)&!XOR(B) | AB(A)&!AB(B)

STEP 3: FALSE GUARDS (all must hold)
G1: bare(A) & !bare(B) & size(A)=size(B) & vars(B)<vars(A) & imb(B)>imb(A) & XOR(A)
G2: bare(A) & vars(A)=2 & !bare(B) & vars(B)>vars(A) & size(B)>=size(A)
G3: !bare(A) & vars(A)>=5 & !bare(B) & vars(B)<vars(A) & size(B)=size(A)
G4: !bare(A) & !bare(B) & size(B)=size(A) & vars(B)<=vars(A)‑2

STEP 4: STRUCTURAL (s=size, v=vars, i=imb; apply first match)
T4: bare(A) & vA>=4 & vB=2 → TRUE
T6: bare(A) & !RP(A) & XOR(A) & vB=2 & RP(B) → TRUE
T7: !bare(A) & vA=3 & iA=2 & vB=3 & !XOR(B) → TRUE
T8: vA=3 & !XOR(A) & bare(B) & !RP(B) → TRUE
F1: vB=vA → FALSE
F2: iB<iA → FALSE
F3: sB<sA → FALSE
T1: bare(A) & vA>=3 & sB>sA → TRUE
T2: bare(A) & bare(B) & vA>=3 & vB>vA & iB>iA → TRUE
T5: vB<vA & iB>iA → TRUE

STEP 5: EXTENDED
D3: AB(A) true for all vars & vB<vA & B bare form x=x*(...) → TRUE
Else FALSE.

OUTPUT (after two consistent runs, else third tiebreak):
VERDICT: TRUE/FALSE
REASONING: (concise)
PROOF: (if TRUE)
COUNTEREXAMPLE: (if FALSE)
